title: YARP Container Configuration
description: Configuration schema for the YARP container application

requestMatch.description: Request match criteria. Path uses ASP.NET route pattern syntax.

Path.description: Request path route pattern to match

Enabled.description: Enable static file serving from wwwroot

Path.description: File to serve for unmatched non-file routes (e.g., /index.html)

Exclude.description: Route-style path matches that bypass SPA fallback

Headers.description: Response header rules for static-host responses only. All matching rules are applied.

Set.description: Headers to set on matching responses

Redirects.description: Redirect rules. First matching rule wins.

Rewrites.description: URL rewrite rules applied before routing using the ASP.NET rewrite middleware (regex syntax).

Regex.description: Regular expression matched against the request path

Replacement.description: Replacement string. May reference capture groups via $1, $2, etc.

SkipRemainingRules.description: If true (default), skip remaining rules when this rule matches

ErrorPages.description: Custom error pages, re-executed against the configured path while preserving the original status code. Keys are 3-digit status codes (e.g. '404') or class wildcards (e.g. '5xx'); exact codes win over wildcards.

Telemetry.description: Telemetry configuration. OTLP export uses standard OTEL_* env vars.

UnsafeAcceptAnyCertificate.description: Skip TLS validation for the OTLP exporter (dev/test only)
